race.comment: SWIFT GUN (2) kept fresh and well placed with Stiff's 2kg claim. Struggled to see the 2000m out when fourth at Queanbeyan on February 17. Lone victory came at this trip and he finds a winnable contest. CALL ME TERRY (5) in great shape and due for a change of luck. Savaged the line with a game fourth over 1200m at Warren. Ready for this trip fifth-up from the favourable gate. COOMA HUT (7) consistent gelding who looks close to another victory. Not that far away in the small field with a narrow third as fav over 1500m at Narrabri. One of the contenders with the key jockey change. MY CROWN (10) five-weeks between runs when he progressed nicely from the low gate to finish a head second over 1200m at Warren. Place best from the awkward gate.
